parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, messages: [ { role:'user', content: [ { type:'text', text:'Describe what this image shows in one short sentence, focused on anything relevant to an insurance enquiry.' }, { type:'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.mediaUrl } } ] } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Code · State').first().json.model, messages: [ { role:'user', content: [ { type:'text', text:'Transcribe this voice note verbatim. Output only the transcription.' }, { type:'input_audio', input_audio: { data: $binary.data.data, format: 'ogg' } } ] } ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const c = $('Code · State').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...c, userText: c.text || '' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, temperature: 0, messages: [ { role:'system', content: 'You are an intent classifier for a WhatsApp sales bot. Return ONLY JSON: {\"intent\":\"<ONE>\"}. Valid: DELAY, BOOKING, AFFIRMATIVE, WATCHED, FORM_DONE, WANTS_MORE_INFO, QUESTION, WANTS_HUMAN, SHORT_NEUTRAL. Short replies (ok, yes, k, done, hi) are SHORT_NEUTRAL. A specific time/day = BOOKING. Vague later = DELAY. A real insurance question = QUESTION. Wanting a human = WANTS_HUMAN.' }, { role:'user', content: 'Stage: ' + $json.stage + '\nMessage: "' + $json.userText + '"' } ] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, temperature: 0.4, messages: [ { role:'system', content: $json.main_prompt }, { role:'user', content: $json.userText } ] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'Sure 🙏 connecting you to our advisor now.', message_type: 'outgoing', private: false }) }}

parameters.content:
## Shared engine (sub-workflow)

Called by each client's thin wrapper via Execute Workflow, receiving the Chatwoot payload + **client_id**. Looks up that client's config row (by Id) and runs everything: parse, intent, flow, send, lead update.

**Key design:** tenant tokens are injected into HTTP headers from the config row — NOT n8n credentials. The only fixed credential is the master NocoDB token on *Get tenant* (reads the clients table).

**Set the 3 placeholders** on *Get tenant*: REPLACE_CONTROL_WORKSPACE / PROJECT / CLIENTS_TABLE.

**Media:** image → Gemini vision (via data_url). Voice → download + Gemini transcribe; swap *HTTP · Transcribe* for your STT if ogg audio isn't accepted. Falls back gracefully.

Note this workflow's id → paste it into the onboard workflow's Settings (engine_workflow_id).
